data.title: Earthquake Tragedy Sparks Crypto Relief as CZ Donates $300K in BNB
data.description:
Binance co-founder CZ donates 500 BNB to Thailand and Myanmar following a 7. 7 magnitude earthquake.

The post Earthquake Tragedy Sparks Crypto Relief as CZ Donates $300K in BNB first appeared on Ecoinimist.

source: https://ecoinimist.com/2025/03/29/cz-donates-to-earthquake-relief/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=cz-donates-to-earthquake-relief

data.title: Peter Brandt Predicts XRP Could Drop to $1.07 Unless It Hits $3
data.description:
The post Peter Brandt Predicts XRP Could Drop to $1. This is a bearish pattern usually that signals an imminent downtrend. He suggests that the price will drop, potentially reaching its lowest point from November 2024, unless the coin makes a strong recovery
source: https://coinpedia.org/news/peter-brandt-predicts-xrp-could-drop-to-1-07-unless-it-hits-3/

data.title: Democratic Lawmakers Sound Alarm Over Trump-Linked Stablecoin USD1
data.description:
Five Democratic lawmakers are urging regulators to investigate World Liberty Financial's USD1 stablecoin, backed by the Trump family, over conflict of interest and financial risk concerns.

The post Democratic Lawmakers Sound Alarm Over Trump-Linked Stablecoin USD1 first appeared on Ecoinimist.

source: https://ecoinimist.com/2025/03/29/democratic-lawmakers-alarm-usd1/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=democratic-lawmakers-alarm-usd1

data.title: Bitget Seed launches STINKDEX (STINKDEX)
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Bitget Seed has launched Solana's MEME token STINKDEX (STINKDEX).
Bitget Seed is a brand new on-chain asset trading platform that focuses on exploring high-potential projects in the market. Bitget Seed will select 0-5 high-quality tokens every day.

data.title: LBank Angels rush to help earthquake-stricken areas in Thailand and provide humanitarian assistance
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: A 7.9-magnitude earthquake struck Myanmar recently, and neighboring areas such as Thailand were also affected. LBank local angels spontaneously and quickly launched an emergency response and have provided international emergency humanitarian assistance in the disaster-stricken areas of Bangkok, Thailand, including providing basic supplies such as drinking water and food aid, and carrying out material distribution and psychological assistance services in the disaster area to ensure that the assistance reaches vulnerable groups directly.

data.title: EU to Invest €1.3 Billion in Strategic Technologies by 2027
data.description: According to PANews, the European Commission announced on March 28 that it will invest €1.3 billion between 2025 and 2027 to deploy key technologies of strategic importance to Europe, including artificial intelligence and cloud computing. The funding will be allocated through the 'Digital Europe' program, focusing on the deployment of artificial intelligence and its applications in business and public administration, cloud computing and data, cybersecurity resilience, and the development of digital technology skills.
